The Python code correctly implements the same logic as the Coq code: is_prime_hex_digit checks for the same six characters ('2', '3', '5', '7', 'B', 'D'), count_prime_hex sums up the count of such characters in the string, and problem_78_spec checks if output equals this count. Both implementations will return the same results for all concrete string inputs.
